commands.description: High-fidelity engineering brief and system health overview.

workflow.plan: Identify environment and active task context.
workflow.normalize: Resolve identity, mode, and orchestration state.
workflow.process: Emit engineering brief and engineering advisory.

workflow.plan: Identify skill and script targets from native and local paths.
workflow.process: Execute skill script and report outcome.

commands.description: Manage deterministic task iteration and workflows.

workflow.plan: Identify task ID and required templates.
workflow.normalize: Generate task prompts, feedback loops, and workflows.
workflow.process: Execute task iterations and apply feedback to state.

commands.description: Unified agent integration management (Sync, Skills, Status).

workflow.plan: Identify requested inspection target (sync, skills, status, advisory).
workflow.normalize: Resolve skill metadata or trigger agent synchronization.
workflow.process: Apply integration artifacts or emit structured reports.

workflow.plan: Identify target configuration key or environment variable.
workflow.normalize: Resolve current value or check global/local priority.
workflow.process: Set, get, or list environment configurations.

commands.description: Verify environment health, security, and integration state.

workflow.plan: Identify critical system and integration requirements.
workflow.normalize: Check versions, paths, and security variables.
workflow.process: Emit diagnostic report with remediation steps.
